name: Reset the Beacon
description: The Beacon of Argynvostholt has been extinguished. You must light the four braziers to restore its light.

objectives.description: Light 4 braziers found on special tiles

specialRules.effect: Spawn a Wraith on the newly revealed tile

introText: Argynvostholt's light has faded, and the valley is shrouded in mist. Light the beacon, and the Silver Dragon will watch over you.
victoryText: The beacon flares to life, its silver light cutting through the mists of Barovia.
defeatText: The mist swallows you whole. Argynvostholt remains a cold, dead ruin.
